---
title: "HW2 Part1"
author: "Chunyu Luo"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(car)

cd4_data <- read.table("CD4_data_Toread.txt", header = T, sep = "")
colnames(cd4_data) <- c("SubjectID", "Treatment", "Age", "Gender", "Week", "LogCD4")
cd4_data$Treatment <- factor(cd4_data$Treatment)
cd4_data$SubjectID <- factor(cd4_data$SubjectID)
```

```{r}
cd4_data$ScheduledWeek <- cut(cd4_data$Week,
                      breaks = c(-1, 4, 12, 20, 28, 36, 44),
                      labels = c(0, 8, 16, 24, 32, 40))

# Descriptive statistics
desc_table <- cd4_data %>%
  group_by(Treatment, ScheduledWeek) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_LogCD4 = mean(LogCD4, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_LogCD4 = sd(LogCD4, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Treatment, ScheduledWeek)

desc_table
```

```{r}
# Interaction Plot
library(ggplot2)

mean_data <- cd4_data %>%
  group_by(Treatment, ScheduledWeek) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_LogCD4 = mean(LogCD4, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(mean_data,
       aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(ScheduledWeek)),
           y = Mean_LogCD4,
           color = factor(Treatment),
           group = Treatment)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Week",
    y = "Mean Log(CD4)",
    color = "Treatment Group",
    title = "Mean Log(CD4) Over Time by Treatment Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("interaction_plot.pdf",
       width = 6,
       height = 4)
```
